content.inputFormat:
First line of the input contains an integer **T** denoting the number of test cases. 
Each of the next **T** lines will contain two space separated integer **L, R**.
content.outputFormat: For each test case, output a single integer in separate line corresponding to the value of desired sum.

sampleTestCases.explanation:
Explanation:
Example case 2: The amazingness values of numbers 11, 12, 13, 14 are 1, 6, 6 and 10 respectively. They sum up to 23.
